heroBadge: Local-first · Bring your own AI · No subscriptions
heroSubtitle: A local-first AI development platform. Connect your own AI APIs, analyze any repository, and chat with your code like a Senior Staff Engineer. Your keys, your data, your models.
principlesTitle: Your keys. Your data. Your AI.
principlesDesc: CodeInsight AI is not a SaaS. It's a self-hosted AI workspace — like Open WebUI or Continue.dev, built for repository analysis.
principleKeysDesc: Connect OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Ollama, LM Studio, Azure, Together, Fireworks, Mistral, xAI, or any OpenAI-compatible API.
principleDataDesc: Analyses are stored locally in your browser. Nothing is sent to us — no telemetry, no servers in the middle.
principleNoSubDesc: No billing, no plans, no trials, no feature locks. Use whatever models and providers you already pay for.
principleLocalDesc: Run entirely offline with Ollama or LM Studio. Your code never leaves your machine.
featuresTitle: Everything a Staff Engineer would tell you
featuresDesc: CodeInsight doesn't summarise your README. It reads your code, understands your architecture, and reports like a senior engineer doing a deep-dive review.
feature1Desc: AI parses every file, builds embeddings, and understands your architecture like a senior engineer reading it for the first time.
feature2Desc: Interactive visualisation of module relationships with circular-dependency and dead-code detection baked in.
feature3Desc: Catches vulnerabilities from hardcoded secrets to weak hashing and XSS — with concrete remediation steps.
feature4Desc: Identifies bundle bloat, N+1 queries, memory leaks, and render bottlenecks ranked by impact.
feature5Desc: Race conditions, null derefs, off-by-one errors and logic flaws — found automatically with severity scoring.
feature6Desc: Generates READMEs, API docs, architecture diagrams, UML and sequence diagrams on demand.
workflowTitle: From keys to AI CTO in 60 seconds
workflowDesc: A simple workflow: connect your AI, paste a repo, get a full report.
step1Desc: Add OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, or a local Ollama instance. Your keys stay in your browser.
step2Desc: Drop any public GitHub repository link. We clone, parse ASTs, and build the dependency graph.
step3Desc: Scores, bugs, security, architecture, performance — and an AI ready to chat about your code.
routingDesc: Route each feature to the model that does it best. Switch providers freely — no lock-in.
providersTitle: Connect any AI you already use
providersDesc: 14 providers supported out of the box, plus any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
ctaDesc: Add your first provider and start analyzing repositories. No sign-up, no billing — just your keys.
faqQ1: Do I need to pay for CodeInsight AI?
faqA1: No. CodeInsight AI is a local-first platform — there are no subscriptions, plans, or billing. You bring your own AI API keys (OpenAI, Anthropic, OpenRouter, etc.) or run a local model with Ollama. You only pay your AI provider directly for what you use.
faqQ2: Where are my API keys stored?
faqA2: Keys are stored only in your browser's local storage. They are never sent to CodeInsight servers, never logged, and never shared. You can clear them at any time from Settings.
faqQ3: Can I use a local model like Ollama or LM Studio?
faqA3: Yes. Add an Ollama or LM Studio provider with the local base URL (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1). Your code is analysed entirely on your machine — nothing leaves your network.
faqQ4: Can I use different models for different tasks?
faqA4: Absolutely. The Feature → Model routing panel lets you assign each feature (chat, bug detection, docs, vision, refactoring) to a different provider and model. For example: Claude for bugs, GPT-4o for chat, DeepSeek for docs.
faqA5: OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic (Claude), Google Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Ollama, LM Studio, Azure OpenAI, Together AI, Fireworks AI, Mistral, xAI (Grok), and any OpenAI-compatible custom endpoint. You can connect unlimited providers.
faqA6: Yes. Because the analysis runs through your own AI keys and runs locally, private repos never pass through a third-party SaaS. Clone the repo locally and point CodeInsight at it, or paste a URL your provider can reach.

hero.headline: Paste a GitHub Repo. AI Understands Everything.
hero.description: 11 AI agents analyze, fix, test, and ship code autonomously. Your keys. Your data. Your models.

multiagent.title: Multi-Agent System
multiagent.desc: Eleven specialized AI agents — Repository Analyst, Security, Performance, Bug-Fixer, Test, Docs, DevOps, Refactoring, PR, Code Reviewer, and an Executive — collaborate like a real engineering team. Each agent owns its domain and reports to a shared context.
multiagent.bullet1: Parallel analysis across security, perf, bugs, architecture
multiagent.bullet2: Shared memory: every agent reads what others learned
multiagent.bullet3: Executive agent plans, replans, and gates quality
multiagent.bullet4: Real-time agent activity feed with consensus voting

workflow.title: Autonomous Workflow
workflow.desc: Plan, Execute, Build, Test, Ship — fully autonomous, fully observable.
workflow.planDesc: Executive agent decomposes the goal into a dependency graph of tasks.
workflow.executeDesc: Specialized agents pick up tasks and operate on real files.
workflow.buildDesc: Code is written, imports updated, diffs validated.
workflow.testDesc: Test agent runs suites, fails fast, and feeds results back.
workflow.shipDesc: PR agent opens a reviewable change with full context.

deep.title: Deep Analysis
deep.desc: Every commit, every file, every dependency — scored, ranked, and explained.
deep.securityDesc: Hardcoded secrets, weak hashing, XSS, SSRF, injection — with concrete remediation steps.
deep.performanceDesc: Bundle bloat, N+1 queries, memory leaks, render bottlenecks ranked by impact.
deep.bugsDesc: Race conditions, null derefs, off-by-one errors, logic flaws with severity scoring.
deep.architectureDesc: Circular dependencies, dead code, module coupling, and a full dependency graph.

step1.title: Paste Repository URL
step1.desc: Drop any public GitHub link. We clone, parse ASTs, and build the dependency graph in seconds.

step2.title: AI Agents Collaborate
step2.desc: Eleven specialized agents analyze security, performance, bugs, and architecture in parallel — sharing context in real time.

step3.title: Get Full Report + Ship
step3.desc: Scores, issues, diagrams, and an AI CTO ready to chat about your code. Ship fixes with one click.

pricing.title: Pricing for every team
pricing.desc: No subscriptions, no billing — bring your own AI keys. Pricing below is what you'd pay if we ever charged. Today: it's free.
pricing.proDesc: For power users — today it's free

finalCta.title: Ready to Ship Code with AI?
finalCta.desc: Launch CodeInsight AI, paste a repo, and watch eleven agents do the work of a senior engineering team — in 60 seconds.
